mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_announcement ( id, title, msg_content, sender, priority, msg_category, msg_type, send_status, send_time, start_time, end_time, bus_type, bus_id, user_ids, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{title}, #{msgContent}, #{sender}, #{priority}, #{msgCategory}, #{msgType}, COALESCE(#{sendStatus}, 0), #{sendTime}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{busType}, #{busId}, #{userIds}, #{createBy}, COALESCE(#{createTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), #{updateBy}, COALESCE(#{updateTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_announcement SET title = #{title}, msg_content = #{msgContent}, sender = #{sender}, priority = #{priority}, msg_category = #{msgCategory}, msg_type = #{msgType}, send_status = #{sendStatus}, send_time = #{sendTime}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, bus_type = #{busType}, bus_id = #{busId}, user_ids = #{userIds}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE is_active = true
